ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt
Pistachio nut, grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: Raisins (28%) (Raisins, Vegetable Oil (Sunflower, Rapeseed)), Cashew Nuts (15%), Almonds (15%) Brazil Nuts (15%), Walnuts (15%), Cranberries (5%) (Cranberries, Sugar, Vegetable Oil (Sunflower, Rapeseed)), Pistachio Nuts (4%), Coconut (3%). May contain nuts and sesame.
